overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a blue Na'vi character exploring 'The Hollows,' a Resistance Clan Home built into a misty forest environment with organic woven wooden architecture and colorful alien flora.

scene_state.functional_zone: clan home entrance platform with offerings

events.description: text overlay appears identifying location as 'The Hollows - Resistance Clan Home'

agents.ego_description: standing at a stone platform examining the large woven wooden entrance structure

entered.detail: large circular door made of woven branches and wood
flat stone ground with cracks and moss
bowls and plates with various items laid out on the stone
dense red and purple alien plants growing against the rocks
tall stone cliff face with moss and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a stone platform entrance to 'The Hollows,' featuring a large woven wooden circular door set into a rocky cliff. Food offerings are laid out on the stone ground to the left, surrounded by vibrant purple and red alien foliage.

events.description: moving from covered platform to open stone pathway
beginning to ascend stone stairs carved into the hillside

agents.ego_description: walking up a stone pathway toward stairs, passing Na'vi NPCs on the right

notable_agents.action: Na'vi character standing near the path holding a weapon

entered.detail: carved stone steps leading up the rocky hillside
tall evergreen trees in the misty background
blue-skinned Na'vi characters standing near the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the entrance platform onto an open stone pathway leading uphill. Stone stairs carved into the rock face ahead lead upward, while Na'vi NPCs stand guard on the right side of the path among tall pine trees.

events.description: entering grassy meadow area with colorful vegetation
turning left to follow the path through the meadow

agents.ego_description: traversing a grassy meadow filled with colorful alien plants, approaching NPCs

notable_agents.action: Na'vi archer standing alert with bow drawn
Na'vi character sitting on a mossy rock

entered.detail: vibrant red and purple leafy plants growing in clusters
tall white cone-shaped fungi or plants growing in rows
open field of yellow-green grass covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide grassy meadow filled with dense alien vegetation, including vibrant red and purple foliage and white spire-like plants. Na'vi NPCs are scattered throughout, including an archer standing alert on the right.

events.description: entering narrow canyon passage with overhead wooden structures
entering mistier, darker area under the large wooden arches

agents.ego_description: walking under large woven wooden archways into a misty canyon

entered.detail: massive curved structure made of woven branches spanning the canyon
narrow passage between rock walls with mist and fog
tall stone canyon walls with moss and small plants
small woven lanterns suspended from the wooden arch

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a misty canyon passage dominated by massive woven wooden arches overhead. Hanging lanterns dangle from the organic structures as the mist thickens between the rocky canyon walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: small camp area with woven baskets

events.description: arriving at camp settlement area with NPCs and supplies

agents.ego_description: approaching a small camp where Na'vi characters are sitting and working with baskets

notable_agents.action: Na'vi character sitting on the ground working with materials
Na'vi character sitting near woven baskets

entered.detail: woven baskets filled with purple vegetables or materials
large rock formation providing shelter over the camp area

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small sheltered camp area under a rocky overhang. Na'vi NPCs sit on the grass working with materials, surrounded by woven baskets filled with purple produce.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rocky cliffside entrance into the heart of a misty, organic settlement. It begins at a stone platform featuring a large woven wooden door and colorful alien foliage, before moving uphill along a carved stone pathway guarded by Na'vi sentinels among tall pine trees. The scene then opens into a wide, grassy meadow filled with vibrant red and purple vegetation and white spire-like plants where archers stand alert. As the terrain shifts, the path narrows into a misty canyon passage dominated by massive woven wooden arches and hanging lanterns, before finally entering a sheltered camp under a rocky overhang where Na'vi NPCs work with woven baskets of produce.
